title: Session Config
subtitle: Session-related AI features and tool execution behavior

sessionTitle.title: Auto Session Title
sessionTitle.subtitle: AI automatically generates concise titles for new conversations
sessionTitle.warning: Session title will use first 20 characters of user message

agentCompanion.title: Agent companion
agentCompanion.subtitle: Show a pixel-style companion animation in the collapsed chat input.

toolExecution.sectionDescription: Confirmation and timeout settings when tools run in a session.

computerUse.sectionDescription: In the 空灵语言 desktop app, the assistant can capture the screen and control the mouse and keyboard; requires a multimodal model for vision.
computerUse.enableDesc: When off, the ComputerUse tool stays disabled in every session mode.
computerUse.desktopOnly: Computer use settings are only available in the 空灵语言 desktop app.

models.empty: No available models. Please add models in "Models" first.
